case_title: HARRIS, LISE ANN VS VERNALI, RONALD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LISE ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERNALI, RONALD $780.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $795.00, $475 DEPOSIT, $5.00 RETURNED CHECK, $300 FOR BAD FAITH RETENTION OF SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, LISE ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERNALI, RONALD $1,705.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,720.00, $600 RENT $5 BOUNCED CHECK, $600 BAD FAITH. NOTE $274 BOUNCHED CHECK IS INCLUDED IN $500 DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
